5.name: [5] Horrid Reality
5.description: Places the mind of the victim in an illusionary world of the vampire's creation

5.name: Horrid Reality
5.description: lity : Places the mind of the victim in an illusionary world of the vampire's creation

6.name: [6] Army of Apparitions
6.description: Create multiple moving illusions False Resonance : Disguise one's thoughts and aura from other attempts to read them Fata Amria : Curse a target with a recurring illusion that interferes with them Fatuus Mastery : No longer spend Willpower or blood points for the first three levels of Chimerstry, require less concentration to maintain illusions. Illusions manifest in the Penumbra as well as the Shadowlands. Horrid Blade of the Demons : Create a dangerous weapon out of nothing Subtle Spy : Impart a piece of the vampire's consciousness into a illusion which can be absorbed later to learn all the illusion witnessed Shared Nightmare/Mass Horror : As Horrid Reality , except it affects multiple people Truth's Essence : Reveal as falsehoods other uses of Chimerstry or Obfuscate

7.name: [7] Aid of the Gandharvas
7.description: Make everything in a room seem luxurious and splendid Far Fatuus : Create illusions anywhere you can visualize Interrupt Reality : Make something that is real seem impossible or fake Mirror's Visage : Create duplicates of oneself Suspension of Disbelief : Make an illusion seem completely real or what is real seem unbelievable

8.name: [8] Fantasy World
8.description: Place a target in an illusionary world in their mind Occlusion/Synesthesia : Control how a single target's or group's senses work Pseudo Blindness : See through almost all falsehoods including Fae Seeming s. Sensory Overload : Incapacitate a target by overstimulating their senses Visions from the Asura : Assault a target with constant illusions, making it nearly impossible to know what is real or not

9.name: [9] Mayaparisatya
9.description: Temporarily make an illusion completely real or alter a person or object that already exists, possibly even erasing them from existence Sensory Deprivation : Make a victim unable to use any of their senses, locking them out from the world Truths of the Universe : Make a created illusion permanently real
